root-question.text: Is cardinality variable (zero, one, or many entities expected)?

branch.conclusion: Use fixed-length tuple type — wrap unnecessary.

question.text: Is strict-mode SO required (OpenAI/Azure strict) OR a deterministic parser downstream?

branch.conclusion: Wrap with `{items[], total_found, truncated}`. Strict-mode requires object root.

question.text: Does a streaming UI need to render items as they arrive?

branch.conclusion: Stream top-level array; trade strict-mode benefits for streaming render.
Wrap. Shape stability outweighs the minor cost when no streaming.
